decision.reduction: exact removed cell-area fraction: (cellPixels - retainedPixels) / cellPixels
decision.aggregate: cell-area weighted across the complete result; empty cells retain zero source pixels
decision.range: canonical finite 0..1 inclusive; zero is never negative zero
decision.emptyWorkerOutput: contentBounds null plus a fresh 1x1 transparent RGBA8 surface
decision.skipPolicy: never skip; every layout cell retains row-major index, row and column
decision.emptyWarning: empty-output on each empty result and once in summary
decision.disabledCrop: threshold 0 remains donor-compatible disabled sentinel; transparent cells keep original bounds and pixels with reduction 0
decision.recipeOwnership: read-only exact protocol recipe; Worker edge proof confirms no mutation

edgeFixture.source: 7x5 RGBA, manual 2x3 non-divisible layout, threshold 50, padding 1
cases: single pixel at top/right with padding clamped inside cell
single center pixel whose padding fills a non-divisible 3x3 cell

boundaries.allEmpty: 3x2 cells produce six ordered 1x1 transparent outputs; summary reduction 1
boundaries.minimum: empty cell surface is exactly 1x1 RGBA8 and never zero-sized
boundaries.maximum: 4096 empty cells produce exactly 4096 ordered outputs; first 0:0:0, last 4095:0:4095
boundaries.hostile: partial null, retained zero axis, NaN, Infinity, negative zero, fractional, impossible and over-budget values reject
boundaries.cancellation: G3-01 cooperative preflight/scan cancellation remains green; G3-02 policy is bounded O(1)
boundaries.padding: padding changes retained bounds before reduction and cannot cross cell bounds
boundaries.threshold: strict alpha boundary is inherited from G3-01; Worker proof retains 128 and excludes 127 at threshold 50

regression.transparentCropDisabled: 2x2 source remains 2x2, reduction 0, no crop operation or warning

verification.focused: final combined run: 7 files / 32 tests pass
verification.timeoutRepair: real Worker test timeout changed locally from 5s to 30s, matching its existing 30s subprocess ceiling; rerun passed in 5.57s
verification.realWorker: pass; edge, all-empty, disabled transparent and max-4096 fixtures

review.scope: Raw-diff review of reduction policy, Worker integration, hostile boundaries, max-4096 fixture, recipe immutability and frozen golden parity.
